2139], "visibility": "visible", "content-desc": [null], "rel-bounds": [28, 197, 1440, 1887], "focused": false, "selected": false, "scrollable-vertical": true, "children": [{"text": "FaxReceive allows you to receive a fax with just your phone or tablet.

WHEN YOU ARE READY to receive a fax you purchase fax time on our servers. Fax Time starts when purchased. Purchase the amount of fax time you want and FaxReceive will exclusively allocate a number to you for the duration of time you purchase.  Provide that fax number to your sender and when they send you a fax it will be delivered to your Android Device.

You can save your fax, print it or send it to another app.

All fax numbers are US based and require a +1 dialing code when accessed from outside the US.

Fax time starts immediately upon purchase and is not refundable but is extendable.
